auth.label: API Key
auth.description: Discourse API key sent with the Api-Key header. Create an API key from your forum admin panel.

extraFields.label: Forum URL
extraFields.description: The HTTPS base URL of your Discourse forum.

extraFields.label: API Username
extraFields.description: The Discourse API username sent with the Api-Username header.

actions.name: create_post
actions.description: Create a reply post in an existing Discourse topic.

topicId.description: The Discourse topic identifier to reply to.

raw.description: The raw Markdown body for the reply.

replyToPostNumber.description: The post number to reply to inside the topic.

createdAt.description: The explicit creation timestamp for the post.

inputSchema.description: Input parameters for creating a Discourse reply post.

anyOf.description: The topic identifier for the post when present.
The topic slug for the post when present.
The one-based post number inside the topic when present.
The post number this post replies to when present.
The author's username when present.
The author's display username when present.
The author's display name when present.
The timestamp when the post was created when present.
The timestamp when the post was updated when present.
The cooked HTML post body when present.
The Discourse post type value when present.

raw.description: The raw Discourse created post payload.

actions.name: create_topic
actions.description: Create a new Discourse topic with a first post.

title.description: The title for the new Discourse topic.

raw.description: The raw Markdown body for the first post.

categoryId.description: The Discourse category identifier for the new topic.

embedUrl.description: A remote URL to associate with the new topic.

externalId.description: A caller-provided external identifier for the new topic.

autoTrack.description: Whether the author should automatically track the new topic.

createdAt.description: The explicit creation timestamp for the post.

inputSchema.description: Input parameters for creating a Discourse topic.

anyOf.description: The topic identifier for the post when present.
The topic slug for the post when present.
The one-based post number inside the topic when present.
The post number this post replies to when present.
The author's username when present.
The author's display username when present.
The author's display name when present.
The timestamp when the post was created when present.
The timestamp when the post was updated when present.
The cooked HTML post body when present.
The Discourse post type value when present.

raw.description: The raw Discourse created post payload.

actions.name: get_topic
actions.description: Read one Discourse topic and its returned posts.

inputSchema.description: Input parameters for reading one Discourse topic.

anyOf.description: The HTML-formatted topic title when present.
The topic slug when present.
The number of posts in the topic when present.
The category identifier for the topic when present.
The timestamp when the topic was created when present.
The topic identifier for the post when present.
The topic slug for the post when present.
The one-based post number inside the topic when present.
The post number this post replies to when present.
The author's username when present.
The author's display username when present.
The author's display name when present.
The timestamp when the post was created when present.
The timestamp when the post was updated when present.
The cooked HTML post body when present.
The Discourse post type value when present.

posts.description: The posts returned for the topic.

details.description: The raw Discourse topic details object.

actions.name: list_categories
actions.description: List Discourse categories visible to the authenticated API user.

inputSchema.description: Input parameters for listing Discourse categories.

anyOf.description: The category slug when present.
The category color hex value when present.
The category text color hex value when present.
The plain-text category description when present.
The number of topics in the category when present.
The number of posts in the category when present.
The category display position when present.
The parent category identifier when present.
Whether the category is read-restricted when present.

raw.description: The raw Discourse category list payload.

actions.name: list_category_topics
actions.description: List topics for one Discourse category.

inputSchema.description: Input parameters for listing category topics.

anyOf.description: Whether the authenticated user can create a topic.
The Discourse per-page value used by the response.
The relative URL for the next topic page when present.
The HTML-formatted topic title when present.
The topic slug when present.
The number of posts in the topic when present.
The number of replies in the topic when present.
The highest post number in the topic when present.
The timestamp when the topic was created when present.

The topic view count when present.
The topic like count when present.
Whether the topic is pinned when present.
Whether the topic is closed when present.
Whether the topic is archived when present.
Whether the topic is visible when present.
The username of the latest poster when present.
The Discourse user identifier when present.
The Discourse username when present.
The user's display name when present.
The Discourse avatar template URL when present.

users.description: The users referenced by the topic list.

raw.description: The raw Discourse topic list payload.
